results.rendered_html:
pra-ṇud (√nud) P. -ṇudati, ˚te, (inf. nodam,  RV. ), to push on, propel, set in motion, drive or scare away,  RV.  &c. &c.:
Caus. -ṇodayati to push or thrust away,  KaṭhUp. ;
to move, excite,  Pañcat. ;
to press a person to do anything (2 acc.),  Var.

results.rendered_html:
praṇud 6 P.
1 To dispel, drive off, remove;  Śi. 9. 71. 
2 To push or thrust forward, push on.
3 To drive, stir, set in motion.
4 To scare way, frighten away.
— Caus.
1 To prompt, incite, urge forward.
2 To push away.
3 To request or ask any one.
